name: Tax Collection
effect: Instantly gain 30 seconds worth of coin production from buildings and assistants.

name: Coin Pillage
requirement: Cast Tax Collection 120 times in less than 5 seconds
effect: Tax Collection also finds 30 seconds worth of Faction Coins.

name: Call to Arms
effect:
Increase the production of all buildings based on buildings owned.
Tier bonus: Buildings count 5% more per tier.
formula: ((25 + 0.3 * x) ^ 0.975)%, where x = Buildings Owned (This Era)

name: Spiritual Surge
effect:
Increase the production of all buildings based on Reincarnations made.
Tier bonus: Reincarnations count 5% more per tier.
formula: (2500 * (R^0.9))%, where R = Reincarnations made

name: Holy Light
effect:
Increase clicking reward by 1750%.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration by 10% per tier.

name: Blood Frenzy
effect:
Increases the production of all Evil buildings by 1500%.
Tier bonus: Increase the production of Non-Unique Buildings by 500% per tier.

name: Gem Grinder
effect:
Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on Reincarnations made.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase Royal Exchange bonus by 10% per tier.
formula: (2500 * (1 + 0.005 * R))%, where R = Reincarnations made

name: Fairy Chanting
effect:
Increase the production of Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths based on Farms, Inns, and Blacksmiths built.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase Fairy Chanting duration by 10% per tier.
formula: (20000^(1 + 0.02 * x^0.2))%, where x = Farms+Inns+Blacksmiths built

name: Fairy Choir
requirement: Cast Fairy Chanting while having at least 50 assistants
effect: Triples your assistants while Fairy Chanting is active.

name: Moon Blessing
effect:
Increase the production of all buildings based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
Tier bonus: Autoclick 2 additional times per second per tier.
formula: (1.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = clicks made this Reincarnation

name: Sun Blessing
requirement: Cast Moon Blessing while having at least 5 Elven Luck triggers this Era
effect: Autoclicks 15 times per second while Moon Blessing is active.

name: God's Hand
effect:
Increase the production of all buildings based on Mana Regeneration. Duration increases with time spent as Good this Reincarnation.
Tier bonus: Increase duration bonus coefficient by 0.05 per tier.
formula: (10 * ln(1 + x)^4)%, where x = Mana Regeneration. Duration bonus: +(0.5 * x^0.5), where x = time spent as Good this Reincarnation

name: God's Rest
requirement: Cast God's Hand while having at least 1500 Maximum Mana and 75 Mana Regeneration
effect: Gives random Faction Coins based on Faction Coin find chance for each other spell cast while God's Hand is active.
formula: +(floor(x^1.1)), where x = Faction Coin find chance

name: Diamond Pickaxe
effect:
Increase clicking reward based on Excavation depth. Also increase Faction Coin find chance by 200%.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance by 10% per tier.
formula: (30 * x)%, where x = Excavation depth

name: Minedwarf
requirement: Find 30,000 Faction Coins using Diamond Pickaxe in a single Era
effect: Increases Diamond Pickaxe bonus to Faction Coin find chance to +300%.

name: Goblin's Greed
effect:
Instantly produce Faction Coins based on Gems owned. Also increase the production of all buildings based on Faction Coins found this Era.
Tier bonus: Increase triggered Tax Collections by +1 per tier.
formula: FC: +(80 + 2.25 * ln(10 + x)^2.25), where x = Gems owned. Production: (30 + 3 * ln(1 + x)^3)%, where x = Faction Coins found this Era

name: Greed Drive
requirement: Cast Goblin's Greed while having at least 100 Royal Exchanges purchased
effect: While Goblin's Greed is active, Tax Collection costs 10% less mana.

name: Night Time
effect:
Increase the production of assistants based on Necropolises built.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase assistants by 5% per tier.
formula: (50 + 50 * x)%, where x = Necropolises built

name: True Night
requirement: Cast Night Time while having at least 20,000% offline production
effect: Increase Night Time bonus to assistant production based on Night Time activity time this Reincarnation. Time spent offline counts 50% more.
formula: (0.4 * x^0.6)%, where x = Night Time activity time this Reincarnation

name: Hellfire Blast
effect:
Increase the production of Evil Fortresses and Hell Portals based on Trophies unlocked.
Tier bonus: Evil spells cast count 50% more per tier.
formula: (120 * x^0.8)%, where x = Trophies unlocked

name: Hell Rush
requirement: Cast Hellfire Blast in the first 60 seconds of a new Era
effect: Hellfire Blast also boosts Halls of Legends (in addition to Evil Fortresses and Hell Portals).

name: Combo Strike
effect:
Increase the production of all buildings by a progressively higher value as you continue casting this spell this Era. Duration is fixed to 16 seconds.
Tier bonus: Combo Strike casts increase the counter by T^2 instead per tier.
formula: (100 * x^0.9)%, where x = Combo Strike counter this Era

name: Perfect Combo
requirement: Cast Combo Strike 50 times in a row without casting other spells
effect: Increase Combo Strike counter based on your longest Era this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2.5 * x^0.5), where x = longest Era this Reincarnation

name: Lightning Strike
effect:
The production of a random building is multiplied by 900% per Iron Stronghold built. Also multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on Gems owned.
Tier bonus: Lightning Strike counts 75% more Iron Strongholds per tier.
formula: FC: (50 + 2 * ln(1 + x)^1.5)%, where x = Gems owned

name: Lightning Storm
requirement: Cast Lightning Strike 100 times in a single Era
effect: Increase Lightning Strike multiplier by 50%.

name: Brainwave
effect:
Increase the production of all buildings by a cumulative 20% per second for 10 minutes.
Tier bonus: Give Brainwave a 10 minutes headstart per tier.

name: Faceless Overmind
requirement: Affiliate with Faceless 5 times in a row
effect: Increase Brainwave multiplier by 50%.

name: Grand Balance
effect:
Increase the production of your least productive building based on the amount of the three most built ones.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana by 5% per tier.
formula: (25 * (x * y * z / (A + 3)^6)^0.9)%, where x/y/z = three most-built building counts, A = Ascension

name: Halls of Balance
requirement: Have Grand Balance affect Hall of Legends
effect: Increases Grand Balance duration to 24 seconds and reduces its cost by 200 mana.

name: Dragon's Breath
effect:
Activates one of the following effects at random.

Red: Increase Unique Building production based on Faction Coins found this Era.
Green: Increase all building production based on spells cast this Reincarnation (higher bonus for lower tiers).
Blue: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration by 200%.
White: Gain assistants based on time spent as Neutral this Reincarnation.
Black: Increase all building production based on Dragon's Breath activity time this Era.
Yellow (A2+): Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on assistants owned.
Tier bonus: Additional effect per tier purchased.
formula:
Red: (1.75 * ln(1 + x)^1.75)%, x = FC found this Era.
Green: (0.000001 * ln(1 + x)^6 * (11-T)^5)%, x = spells cast this Era.
Blue: x200% Mana Regeneration.
White: +(30 * x^0.7), x = Neutral time this Reincarnation.
Black: (30 + 0.85 * x^0.85)%, x = Dragon's Breath activity time this Era.
Yellow: (1.75 * ln(x)^1.75)%, x = assistants owned.

name: Dragon's Roar
requirement: Cast Dragon's Breath while having at least 5 other active spells
effect: Dragon's Breath multiplicatively increases Faction Coin find chance based on its duration.
formula: (6 * x^0.6)%, where x = Dragon's Breath duration

name: Share Benefits
effect: Duration fixed to 20 seconds. Increase production of all buildings and multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on Share Benefits Tier. Also produce Tax Collection casts per second based on Maximum Mana, Tax Collection worth and triggered Tax Collections. While active, increases mana produced stat based on Mana Regeneration and Maximum Mana. Requires Round Table.

name: Reap Interests
effect: Additional casts multiply Reap Interests worth. Requires Dark Covenant. Upgrades that cast free Tax Collection are treated as Reap Interests casts.
formula: *(ln(1 + x)^4), where x = Reap Interests casts this Era

name: Appraisal Vantage
effect: Generates additional Faction Coins based on assistants owned, Tax Collection worth and Faction Coin find chance. Requires Secret Exchange. Upgrades that cast free Tax Collection are treated as Appraisal Vantage casts.
formula: +(x * y * z^1.25), where x = assistants owned, y = Tax Collection worth, z = Faction Coin find chance

name: Temporal Flux
effect:
Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on time spent this Era. Also multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on time spent this Era.
Tier bonus: Mana produced this Era counts 10% more per tier.
formula: (x^0.825)%, where x = time spent this Era in seconds

name: Maelstrom
effect:
Increase the production of two random buildings based on one of these stats, chosen at random: mana produced, trophies unlocked, Faction Coins found, or assistants owned.
Tier bonus: Affect 1 more random building per tier.
formula: Mana: (0.1 * ln(1+x)^5)%, x = mana produced this Era. Trophies: (5 * x^0.9)%, x = trophies unlocked. FC: (0.01 * ln(1+x)^4)%, x = FC found this Era. Assistants: (0.1 * ln(1+x)^5)%, x = assistants owned

name: All Creation
effect:
Increase production of all buildings based on Mana Regeneration.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems by 10% per tier.
formula: (0.5 * ln(1 + x)^3 + x^0.5)%, where x = Mana Regeneration

name: Precognition
effect:
Buildings, Assistants, Royal Exchanges, Spells cast and Clicks count more based on Mana produced this Era. Improved formula with AR2 purchased.
Tier bonus: Research Points count 10% more per tier.
formula: (0.65 * ln(1 + x)^1.15)%, where x = mana produced this Era. With AR2: (1.3 * ln(1 + x)^1.25)%

name: Chrono Loading
requirement: Cast Precognition with at least 1e17 Mana Regeneration
effect: A fraction of Precognition duration is added to time spent this Era.
formula: (150 * ln(1 + x/60)^2), where x = Precognition duration

name: Limited Wish
cost: 800,000 mana (decreases 1% per minute, resets every 60 min)
effect:
Duration fixed to 6 seconds. Multiplicatively increase a random stat based on Limited Wish activity time and casts this Era. Production effect is separate from other effects.
Tier bonus: Limited Wish casts count (10 * T^2)% more per tier.
formula: Production: (50 + 5 * ln(1 + x)^1.75 * y)%, x = activity time this Era, y = random 1 to casts this Era. Other effects: (25 + 2.5 * ln(1 + x)^1.75 * y^0.5)%

name: Persistent Entropy
requirement: Cast Limited Wish 100 times within 30 minutes of a new Era
effect: Give Limited Wish a headstart of 500 casts.

name: Infinite Spiral
effect:
Multiplicatively increase assistants based on Maximum Mana. Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on Faction Coin find chance. Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on Excavation depth.
Tier bonus: Multiplicatively increase offline bonus by 10% per tier.
formula: Assistants: (10 * ln(1+x)^1.25)%, x = Max Mana. Max Mana: (1.5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, x = FC find chance. FC find chance: (10 + 0.1 * x^0.75)%, x = Excavation depth

name: Reality Crater
requirement: Cast Infinite Spiral with at least 3 Excavation Resets this Era
effect: Infinite Spiral also reduces excavation cost multiplier based on assistants owned.
formula: -(0.001 * log(1 + x)), where x = assistants owned

name: Catalyst
effect: Activates two random vanilla or 1st alignment spells at one tier below the Ascension maximum. Requires Djinn Bloodline. Djinn Perk 6: Catalyst doubles the Spell Tier bonus effect of its activated spells.
